description_long: This is a modern, three-seat bench with a sleek, angular metal frame and tan cushioned seats, designed for comfort and durability. The bench features a high backrest and a single armrest on one end, with the other end open for easy access. The frame is constructed from black metal, providing structural support and a contemporary aesthetic, while the seat and backrest are upholstered in a soft, tan fabric or leather. A single white cushion is placed on one of the seats, adding a touch of comfort and visual contrast. The bench is accompanied by a life-sized human figure, demonstrating its scale and intended use in public or communal spaces. The overall design suggests suitability for urban environments such as parks, waiting areas, or transit stations.
description: A modern three-seat bench with tan cushioned seats, black metal frame, high backrest, and a single armrest, suitable for public urban spaces.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the high backrests, the single armrest on the left, and the overall length of the bench.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the angular metal frame, the depth of the seat, and the human figure seated comfortably.
description_view_2: Front view displaying all three seats, the tan cushions, the single white pillow, and the open right side for easy access.
description_view_3: Angled top-down view emphasizing the seat surfaces, the arrangement of the cushions, and the geometric frame structure.
